description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image and a before_script that runs apk update, apk add doxygen, and apk add ttf-freefont graphviz. Define two jobs: a pages job that runs doxygen satnogs-rotator-firmware.doxyfile then moves the generated html to a public/ directory, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch; and a test job that runs the same doxygen command but is excluded from the master branch. Both jobs inherit the before_script and use the default stage. The pipeline deploys the documentation to GitLab Pages.
